reason: SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY was missing from prod across all 3 targets (AWS, GitHub, LangGraph Cloud). Copied staging's value verbatim into all 3 so the routine-scheduler flow works end-to-end after the prod promote. Value confirmed unchanged from the 2026-07-13 staging precedent (BH-1063) via sha256 prefix match — no rotation since.
change_kind: aws-secrets-manager put-secret-value (read-modify-write) + github-actions-secret-add + langsmith-vault langgraph-deployment PATCH (full secrets array, read-modify-write)

source_of_truth.note: Matches the 2026-07-13 BH-1063 precedent's recorded hash exactly — confirms no value rotation. Value NOT captured in this file — write-only discipline.

targets_written.name: SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY
targets_written.consumed_by: .github/workflows/deploy.yml -> scripts/sync-pulumi-config.sh -> Pulumi config -> ECS task env

targets_written.api_key_source: prod/platform/platform-core LANGGRAPH_API_KEY (the same secret this key was being added alongside — confirmed admin-scoped for /v2/deployments PATCH, unlike the runtime key in brightbot/.env_prod which returned 403)
targets_written.patch_method: GET full deployment (54 secrets with values) -> jq append 2 new entries (this key + SCHEDULER_WEBHOOK_SECRET, same PATCH call) -> PATCH full 56-secret array back. Never sent a partial array.

rollback: AWS: put-secret-value with the 29-key payload minus this key. GitHub: gh secret delete SCHEDULER_SERVICE_API_KEY --repo brighthive/brightbot-slack-server. LangGraph: GET full deployment, filter out this key + SCHEDULER_WEBHOOK_SECRET from secrets array, PATCH the remaining 54 back (never partial).
